title: CorrectPortals
description: Correct the hitbox of portals in 1.21.5 to match the 1.21.4 and 1.21.6 behavior
body:
Mod to correct the hitbox of portals in 1.21.5 to match the 1.21.4 and 1.21.6 behavior.

Works by overriding the behavior of `getEntityInsideCollisionShape` to that of its superclass.

The CorrectPortals logo is a derivative work of [https://faithfulpack.net/](https://faithfulpack.net/), Copyright © Faithful Resource Pack. Not affiliated with them, but check out their work!
